channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Nissan is testing driverless vehicles in city streets
item.description: The van makes its way slowly but surely through the city streets, braking gently when a car swerves into its lane. But its steering wheel is turning on its own, and there’s no one in the driver’s seat. The driverless technology from Nissan Motor Corp.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: I tried out a bunch of the AI assistants. Here’s what you need to know about each one
item.description: Does it feel to you like there are way too many AI assistants to keep track of? Between ChatGPT, Microsoft Copilot, Google Gemini, Anthropic Claude, DeepSeek, and others, it’s hard to remember what each one excels at—if anything.
item.dc:creator: Jared Newman, Fast Company

item.title: AI slop is suffocating the web, says a new study
item.description: The generative AI revolution shows no sign of slowing as OpenAI recently rolled out its GPT-4.5 model to paying ChatGPT users, while competitors have announced plans to introduce their own latest models—including Anthropic, which unveiled Claude 3.7 Sonnet, its latest language model, late last month
item.dc:creator: Chris Stokel-Walker, Fast Company

item.title: OnePlus is ditching the Alert Slider for an iPhone-style customizable button - and I’ll be sad to see it go
item.description: OnePlus’ CEO has confirmed that the Alert Slider found on all OnePlus phones won’t be sticking around in future generations, replaced by an Apple-style customizable button
item.dc:creator: jamie.richards@futurenet.com (Jamie Richards), TechRadar

item.title: RTX 5050 rumors detail full spec of desktop graphics card, suggesting Nvidia may use slower video RAM – but I wouldn’t panic yet
item.description: Some gamers are disappointed with the rumored spec of the RTX 5050, but even if it pans out like this, I wouldn’t dismiss the GPU so readily.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Trump: Administration talking to four groups about possible TikTok sale
item.description: President Trump said Sunday his administration is in talks with four groups about a potential TikTok sale, with less than a month until a ban on the popular video-sharing platform is set to go into effect.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Ray-Ban and Meta Unveil Limited-Edition Smart Glasses Design with Coperni - A Disappointing Result?
item.description: Ray-Ban and Meta have collaborated with Coperni to create a new limited-edition smart glasses design, but it falls short of expectations. Find out why.
item.dc:creator: hamish.hector@futurenet.com (Hamish Hector), TechRadar

item.title: Oracle EHR Outage Affects Veterans Affairs Hospitals - Nationwide Disruption Exposed
item.description: Oracle's Federal electronic health records (EHR) software recently suffered a nationwide outage, causing six Veterans Affairs hospitals to revert to contingency procedures in order to continue treating patients as normal.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Advantage, Alexa – Apple's smart home hub reportedly 'postponed' due to Siri slowdown
item.description: Apple’s smart home hub with AI-powered Siri has been delayed, a new report claims–and that could leave the door wide open to Amazon's Alexa+ in 2025.
item.dc:creator: alexblake.techradar@gmail.com (Alex Blake), TechRadar

item.title: Windows 11 users get ready for more ‘recommendations’ from Microsoft – but I’m relieved to say these suggestions might actually be useful
item.description: Incoming new ‘recommendations’ for Windows 11 users look like a positive step forward, and thankfully there are no adverts here.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Mecalux integra la IA generativa en su ‘software’ de gestión de almacenes
item.description: Mecalux Sostware Solutions da un paso adelante en su estrategia de transformación digital al integrar la inteligencia artificial (IA) generativa en su software de gestión de almacenes Easy WMS con el propósito de responder a peticiones empleando el lenguaje natural.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Building generative AI? Get ready for generative UI
item.description: There’s currently no stopping generative AI spending. Analyst firm Omdia expects spending on generative AI applications to hit $58 billion by 2028. Yet while this level of investment is a significant amount, actual deployment of generative AI applications is still slow.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: UC teams with Bay Area tech company for new lab that hopes to make AI work for artists
item.description: Can a new initiative make peace between human creatives and the technology threatening to displace them?
item.dc:creator: Jenna Ahart, The Mercury News

item.title: Almost indestructible memory card launched; Lexar's Armor SD steel cards are water resistant and can survive a 16-feet drop
item.description: Lexar stainless-steel SD cards are 37 times stronger than standard ones, offering durability for even extreme conditions.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Apple iPhone 17 Leak: Hands-on Video Reveals Dummy Units and Predicted Thicknesses
item.description: A leaked hands-on video shows off dummy units for the Apple iPhone 17, iPhone 17 Air, and iPhone 17 Pro. The video also reveals predicted thicknesses for each of the handsets.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Nvidia conference will make a big splash in downtown San Jose
item.description: About 25,000 people will swarm downtown bars and restaurant in mid-March during GTC, Nvidia's big technology conference.
item.dc:creator: Sal Pizarro, The Mercury News

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: Helping DOGE cut waste
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: YouTube is cracking down on gambling content. Here’s what’s changing
item.description: YouTube is taking steps to crack down on gambling content. On Tuesday, the platform announced a new policy that bans creators from directing viewers to “unapproved” gambling websites through links, images, text, logos, or verbal mentions.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Trump tells crypto leaders at White House summit he's committed to helping their industry
item.description: President Donald Trump said Friday that he’s committed to making the U.S. a world leader in cryptocurrencies as industry leaders heaped praise on him for reversing what they said had been unfair attacks on digital assets by the previous administration.
item.dc:creator: Alan Suderman, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: February’s IT job market in the US shows mixed signals; unemployment ticks up
item.description: “Sluggish” might be the best word to describe the IT job market after the US Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS) published its data for February employment today. The data offered mixed signals for US tech jobs: even though the number of tech roles grew, unemployment rose.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: JFrog unveils JFrog ML for MLOps
item.description: JFrog has released JFrog ML, an MLOps solution designed to bring devops best practices to building, deploying, managing, and monitoring AI/ML workflows.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: US military's mini space shuttle returns to Earth after orbiting for 434 days on a secret mission
item.description: The U.S. military's classified mini space shuttle has returned to Earth after circling the world for 434 days.
item.dc:creator: Marcia Dunn, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Private lunar lander is declared dead after landing sideways in a crater near the moon's south pole
item.description: A private lunar lander is no longer working after landing sideways in a crater near the moon's south pole.
item.dc:creator: Marcia Dunn, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Why weird JD Vance memes have taken over the internet
item.description: Ironically enough, a divisive moment in the Oval Office last weekend seems to have brought the entire internet together.
item.dc:creator: Joe Berkowitz, Fast Company

item.title: Siemens announces $285 million investment in US manufacturing
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Siemens plans to invest $285 million in manufacturing in the United States, the tech company said Thursday, including two new facilities in California and Texas. The U.S. is the largest market for the company. The recent investments in the Siemens' U.S.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: AI chatbots infected with Russian disinformation: Study
item.description: The world’s most popular artificial intelligence (AI) chatbots are infected with Russian disinformation, according to a study published Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: Achieving unified visibility for effective zero trust implementation
item.description: All components of a zero trust architecture must generate data that is observable, available and able to be correlated within a unified data plane. The post Achieving unified visibility for effective zero trust implementation first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Democrats ask for investigation into whether Musk is using government position to influence X advertisers
item.description: Democratic senators are asking the Department of Justice (DOJ) to investigate whether tech billionaire Elon Musk, a senior adviser to President Trump, is leveraging his government position to pressure advertisers into spending more on his social media platform, X.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, The Hill

item.title: UK watchdog drops competition review of Microsoft's OpenAI deal
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Britain's competition watchdog said Wednesday it has dropped its review of Microsoft's partnership with OpenAI, saying it's satisfied that the deal doesn't need a closer investigation under the country's merger rules.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: AI driving a 165% rise in data center power demand by 2030
item.description: Global power demand from data centers will increase 50% by 2027 and by as much as 165% by the end of the decade compared with 2023, according to a recent report from Goldman Sachs Research The industry is shrugging off the potential of DeepSeek – which claimed large-scale AI modeling capabilities fr
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: AI pioneers who channeled 'hedonistic' machines win computer science's top prize
item.description: Teaching machines in the way that animal trainers mold the behavior of dogs or horses has been an important method for developing artificial intelligence and one that was recognized Wednesday with the top computer science award.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Top data storage certifications to sharpen your skills
item.description: Enterprise data storage skills are in demand, and that means storage certifications can be more valuable to organizations looking for people with those qualifications.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Reddit co-founder Alexis Ohanian joins bid to acquire TikTok
item.description: Reddit co-founder Alexis Ohanian has joined billionaire Frank McCourt’s bid to acquire TikTok as a strategic adviser.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: AirPods dying? Professor discovers microenvironment that may be responsible
item.description: UT-Austin associate professor Yijin Lu said a similar microenvironment exists in all sorts of electronics. This includes places like your phone and electric vehicles.
item.dc:creator: Eric Henrikson, NewsNation

item.title: Tariffs for now won’t impact IT organizations
item.description: The impact of tariffs by the Trump Administration on semiconductors from Taiwan is so far not cause for alarm, according to one analyst.
item.dc:creator: Network World
